query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `staff` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `user_id` int,
  `name` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `email` varchar(200),
  `phone` varchar(50),
  `role` enum('admin','accountant','property_manager','maintenance_supervisor','leasing_agent','receptionist') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'receptionist',
  `department` varchar(100),
  `is_active` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `notes` text,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` bigint NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `role_permissions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `role` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `module` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `can_view` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `can_create` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `can_edit` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `can_delete` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `can_export` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `login_log` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `user_id` int,
  `email` varchar(200),
  `ip_address` varchar(100),
  `user_agent` text,
  `status` enum('success','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'success',
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `internal_messages` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `from_user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `to_user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `subject` varchar(300),
  `body` text NOT NULL,
  `is_read` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `parent_id` int,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `webhooks` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `name` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `url` text NOT NULL,
  `secret` varchar(200),
  `events` text NOT NULL,
  `is_active` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `last_triggered_at` bigint,
  `failure_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `api_usage_log` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `api_key_id` int NOT NULL,
  `endpoint` varchar(300) NOT NULL,
  `method` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `status_code` int,
  `ip_address` varchar(100),
  `response_time_ms` int,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `listing_views` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `listing_id` int NOT NULL,
  `ip_address` varchar(100),
  `source` varchar(100),
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `contract_renewal_requests` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `contract_id` int NOT NULL,
  `tenant_id` int NOT NULL,
  `requested_rent_amount` decimal(12,2),
  `notes` text,
  `status` enum('pending','approved','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `reviewed_by` int,
  `reviewed_at` bigint,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL
);
